focusControls.fn2: A-C: Recall shooting functions without hold; D: Starlight view (photo Lv)
focusControls.fn2FocusModeLimitation: Recall cannot change Focus mode. Keep A-C in AF-C. D uses Starlight view instead of recall because its normal star workflow is MF.
focusControls.lensLFn: AF-area mode + AF-ON: Wide-area AF C1; all four 180-600mm L-Fn buttons share this assignment

sharedControls.fn2: A-C: Recall shooting functions without hold; D: Starlight view (photo Lv)
sharedControls.lensFn: AF-area mode + AF-ON: Wide-area AF C1

recallByCustomSettingsBank.A: M; 1/3200 s; f/6.3; Auto ISO max 12800; Matrix; WB unchecked; Wide C1 19x11; Auto detection; lock-on 2 Erratic; CH 20 fps; AF-ON enabled
recallByCustomSettingsBank.B: M; 1/4000 s; f/6.3; Auto ISO max 12800; Matrix; WB unchecked; Wide C1 19x11; Birds; lock-on 2 Erratic; CH 20 fps; AF-ON enabled
recallByCustomSettingsBank.C: M; 1/2000 s; f/2.8; Auto ISO max 6400; Matrix; WB unchecked; Wide C1 19x11; Auto detection; lock-on 3 Steady; CH 15 fps; AF-ON enabled

photoF2Banks.bankD: Fn2 toggles Starlight view (photo Lv); it is not assigned Recall shooting functions. Live histogram is unavailable while Starlight view is On.

bankBehavior.extendedMenuBanks: On; required so exposure mode, shutter speed and aperture follow A-D
bankBehavior.reset: Reset each Photo Shooting Menu Bank and Custom Settings Bank separately by highlighting A-D and pressing O (Q).

storage.warning: Overflow increases capacity but does not create a duplicate; make a separate daily backup.

menuSettingsBackup.save: Choose Save menu settings after configuring and testing all A-D banks.
menuSettingsBackup.card: With two cards inserted, the file is written to the card selected under Photo Shooting Menu > Primary slot selection; normally Slot 1 CFexpress for this companion.
menuSettingsBackup.file: Copy the camera-created NCSET*** file to a computer and never rename it.
menuSettingsBackup.restore: Put the original unrenamed file at the card's top level, insert the card, then choose Load menu settings and verify all banks and controls.
menuSettingsBackup.limitations: Same Nikon Z8 model only; custom Picture Controls save as Auto; verify date/time, exposure values, lens-dependent VR and settings excluded by Nikon.

liveHistogram.photoMonitor: Custom Settings Menu > d Shooting/display > d19 Custom monitor shooting display > Display 2: enable Basic shooting info and Histogram
liveHistogram.photoViewfinder: Custom Settings Menu > d Shooting/display > d20 Custom viewfinder shooting display > Display 2: enable Basic shooting info and Histogram
liveHistogram.videoType: Custom Settings Menu > g Video > g18 Brightness information display > Histogram: Standard, transparency 2, bottom right
liveHistogram.videoMonitor: g20 Custom monitor shooting display > Display 2: Basic shooting info and Brightness information
liveHistogram.videoViewfinder: g21 Custom viewfinder shooting display > Display 2: Basic shooting info and Brightness information
liveHistogram.use: Repeat in Custom Settings Banks A-D and press DISP while shooting to cycle to the histogram screen.
liveHistogram.caution: The live histogram reflects the preview. Bank D Starlight view disables the live histogram entirely; turn it Off and use the captured-image histogram and a magnified test frame.

zebra.menu: Custom Settings Menu > g Video > g15 Zebra pattern; g16 Limit zebra pattern tone range
zebra.reason: Red is easier to see than Gray against tan grass, brown or gray animals, pale fur, clouds, dust, shadows and flat video previews; the overlay is not recorded.
zebra.alternative: Use Gray if Red is distracting or difficult to distinguish because of color vision.

photo.aperture: Wide open: f/5.6 at 180mm to f/6.3 near 600mm
photo.metering: Matrix; Highlight-weighted for pale animals in harsh sun

video.audio: Built-in mic, Auto sensitivity; attenuator Off; wind reduction when windy
video.use: General wildlife behavior and moving mammals

photo.aperture: Wide open: f/5.6 at 180mm to f/6.3 near 600mm
photo.metering: Matrix; Highlight-weighted for white or bright birds

video.format: 4K 120p when slow motion matters; otherwise 4K 60p; H.265 10-bit MOV, SDR
video.audio: Built-in mic, Auto sensitivity; attenuator Off; wind reduction when windy
video.use: Birds in flight, cheetah runs, fights and fast behavior

photo.shutter: Auto ISO minimum shutter 1/500 s for people; Auto or slower on stable support for landscapes
photo.metering: Matrix; Highlight-weighted or Spot only when deliberately needed
photo.af: AF-C People or AF-S single point
photo.iso: Auto ISO, max 6,400; minimum shutter 1/500 s for people

video.audio: Built-in mic, Auto sensitivity; attenuator Off; wind reduction outdoors when windy
video.hiResZoom: Off by default; temporary On only at 4K 24/30p for a controlled push-in; forces Wide-area AF L and Electronic VR Off
video.use: Family, lodges, Zanzibar portraits and compressed environmental stories; 70mm is often too tight for Stone Town interiors, groups and broad landscapes, so use a wider lens if owned or a phone/panorama

photo.shutter: 5-7 s at 70mm, start 5 s; 4-5 s at 100mm; 2-3 s at 135mm; 1.6-2 s at 180mm; moon 1/125-1/500 s
photo.metering: Matrix as a reference; verify with histogram and test image
photo.af: Manual focus using magnified live view
photo.lens: 70-180mm; strongest for moon, constellations and compressed night scenes

video.audio: Built-in mic, Auto sensitivity; attenuator Off; wind reduction only when needed
video.use: Campfire, lodge ambience and low-light scenes; not star-trail video
